prompt: I failed my exam and I feel completely worthless.
Someone I trusted lied to me, and now I feel like I can't trust anyone.
I'm so exhausted and drained that I can't bring myself to do anything anymore.
I let someone down and I feel like a terrible person because of it.
I feel completely alone, like no one really understands me or cares.
I don't think I'm talented enough to ever be good at anything.
My family doesn't appreciate anything I do and I'm sick of even trying.
There's so much going on that I feel completely paralyzed and hopeless.
I got rejected and now I feel like nobody will ever want me.
Everyone around me seems more successful than me and it makes me feel like a failure.
I'm scared that if I fail, everyone will judge me and think I'm a loser.
I worked so hard for this and I still didn't get it. It feels like it was all pointless.
Everyone keeps disagreeing with me, but I'm sure I'm the one who's right.
Someone humiliated me in front of everyone and I want to get back at them.
I made a stupid mistake and I can't stop replaying it in my head.
I'm terrified about my future and I can't stop worrying about it.
My friend disagreed with me, and honestly I think they're just a toxic person.
My friend got the thing I wanted and now I just feel bitter and jealous.
No matter how hard I try, nothing ever seems to change for me.
If I can't do something perfectly, I feel like there's no point in even trying.
